steps.title: Use the straight angle
steps.content:
From the figure, the angles labeled $x^\circ$, $y^\circ$, and $z^\circ$ form a straight angle, so their measures add to $180^\circ$.

$$x+y+z=180$$

steps.title: Substitute and solve
steps.content: Use $x=65$ and $y=75$ in the angle equation. $$65+75+z=180$$ $$140+z=180$$ $$z=40$$ The answer is C.
